project_version_id.description: The ID of the project version where category has to be added

order.description: The position inside the parent category

parent_category_id.description: The ID of the parent category. If empty, it will be added as top level category)

content.description: The content of the article, for any Editor type, use this property

user_id.description: The ID of the team account

slug.description:
Optional custom URL-friendly slug for the category. If not provided, a slug will be auto-generated from the name.
When provided, the slug must be unique within the project version, otherwise an error will be returned.

Create a new Category as Folder..summary: Add Name, Project_Version_Id, order, category_type, and user_id to create a new category. This is an example for category_type as Folder.
